details.reason: Activity '.SplashActivity' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

Activity '.NfcDiscoveredActivity' has an intent-filter but no explicit android:exported attribute. On API < 31 this defaults to exported=true. No permission guard found — potentially accessible by any app.

issue: exported component handles sensitive intent actions

details.reason: Activity '.NfcDiscoveredActivity' is reachable from other apps and handles sensitive system intent actions. Verify that all incoming Intent data is validated before use.

issue: deep-link activity with custom URI scheme and no permission

details.reason: Activity '.NfcDiscoveredActivity' registers the custom URI scheme 'canon-a01-cw://' without a permission guard. Any app can trigger this activity by crafting an Intent with a matching URI.
